title: How one hard decision before noon changes your whole day
caption:
Your 20s are being built one morning at a time.

The day you do the hardest thing first — pray before you scroll, open the hard email before the easy ones, hit the gym before you feel like it — that's the day you teach yourself something that lasts: you don't wait for the mood. Mood follows action.

Name the hard thing the night before. Wake up already decided. Do it before the phone gets its vote in.

One hard rep before noon changes your posture for everything after it. Not because the day got easier — because you already proved something to yourself before anyone else woke up.

Save this and use it tomorrow.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thework #morning #discipleship
